tasks.dev: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; exec astro dev "$@"' sh
tasks.start: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; exec astro dev "$@"' sh
tasks.preview: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; exec astro preview "$@"' sh
tasks.astro: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; exec astro "$@"' sh
